name: KeepWell Break Reminder
description: Reminds the user to take a break based on ultradian rhythm (90-min cycles). Triggers when the agent completes a task.

then.prompt: Check the current system time. If the user has been working for a while (agent has completed multiple tasks in this session), provide ONE brief KeepWell well-being nudge from any of the 8 dimensions (rotate — pick a dimension not recently used). Format: [Dimension Icon] [Action in under 20 words]. Add a 1-sentence science note. Keep the total under 3 lines. If the session just started or the user seems in deep flow, skip this entirely.
